_description: Google Gemini 2.5 Pro (gemini-2.5-pro-preview-06-05). Top-tier reasoning model with 1M token context, native tool use, and thinking mode. Excels at code generation, long-document analysis, and complex multi-step tasks. Competitive with Opus 4 at lower cost.

tool_calling._comment: Gemini 2.5 Pro supports function calling with automatic tool selection. Parallel calls supported.

thinking._comment: Gemini 2.5 Pro has a thinking mode that improves reasoning quality. Budget controls max thinking tokens.

dynamic_temperature._comment: Google recommends temperature=1.0 for most use cases with Gemini 2.5.

tool_call_batching.system_prompt_suffix: When multiple tools are needed, call ALL of them in a single response.
tool_call_batching._comment: Gemini 2.5 Pro supports parallel function calls.

pricing._comment: As of 2025. Tiered input pricing based on context length. Thinking tokens billed separately.

rate_limits._comment: Very high token throughput. Free tier available with lower limits.

running_config.description: Google AI Studio or Vertex AI. Requires GOOGLE_API_KEY or GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS.
